summary: Aggregated parallel role lifecycle samples and classified root causes: contract carrying insufficiency and frontend consumption branch are primary; business fact and permission are not primary in sampled evidence.
risks: Lifecycle entry coverage remains significantly narrower in custom scene contract than native menu surface.
Action-open view_mode carrying and search/group interaction binding are still non-equivalent to native behavior.
next_step: Open implementation batch in order: P0 contract carrying coverage + view_mode semantics, P1 frontend search/group binding parity, P2 role-parallel full-chain verification.
